news.headline: A Visit to a Temple at the Heart of the Thailand-Cambodia Conflict
news.summary: A rare visit to a Khmer temple on Thailand and Cambodia’s border showed how deadly clashes between the two countries have scarred a heritage site.

news.headline: 'Unacceptable': Drone strike kills French soldier in Iraq's Kurdistan region
news.summary: France’s armed forces ministry on Friday said a drone strike killed a French soldier and wounded six others in Iraq’s autonomous Kurdistan region. President Emmanuel Macron described the attack as "unacceptable" and insisted Paris’s role in the Middle East war remained strictly defensive.

news.headline: Trial starts in case of explosives sent to UK and Poland
news.summary: The parcel plot is one of a wave of sabotage attacks across Europe which officials have linked to Russia.

news.headline: Judge quashes subpoenas of Fed chair, says investigation was ‘politically motivated’
news.summary:
A federal judge on Friday quashed US Justice Department subpoenas issued to the Federal Reserve in January, a severe blow to an investigation that has already attracted strong criticism on Capitol Hill.
